body.visualDesc: Intimate close-up of TWO characters only: the tiny lemon-yellow duckling with flat orange bill looking up with round trusting eyes at PIP (the cream-white chick wearing her straw farmer hat and red neck bandana - Pip MUST be the chick in this shot). Pip looks down at the duckling with solemn tenderness, one wing gently resting on the duckling's damp head-tuft. Warm golden dusk light halos both of them. Mo and Bo are only soft blurred shapes far in the background. A single firefly glows between them.
